title: Udanadi Mangalyam
overview: Doing a job is not just getting salary, every job is a dream for oneself, but in between the common people, those who live believing either their job, dreams nor their family commitments are paramount in this little village. This movie is the story of Janaki, who lives by her dreams, her likes.
